title: Option to see 'Assigned to Name' instead of either photo or initials
excerpt: While its great to see image of someone who’s assigned to a task, we would like an option to see their first name, last name or both. Showing just initials is confusing for large teams when you can have multiple people w…

posts.author: MACMonday (Meena Barve)
posts.cookedHtml: While its great to see image of someone who’s assigned to a task, we would like an option to see their first name, last name or both. Showing just initials is confusing for large teams when you can have multiple people with same initials.

posts.author: ASL (Lyn Snailham)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree, this seems like a really obvious requirement. Initials & tiny photos just aren’t helpful for larger, remote teams

posts.author: lawsonmy (Myisha )
posts.cookedHtml: This functionality is truly needed. Not everyone that is viewing data will easily know who is represented in a picture. Please fix this ASAP.

posts.author: Colton (colton)
posts.cookedHtml: Not to mention, the photos are so small, it’s impossible to tell who it is without hovering over and waiting for the larger version. This feature would be nice.
